data.title: Johnson Fistel Investigates VenHub Global, Inc. (NASDAQ: VHUB) on Behalf of Investors
data.description: A legal firm, Johnson Fistel, PLLP, is currently conducting an investigation into VenHub Global, Inc. (NASDAQ: VHUB) as of July 1, 2026. This investigation is aimed at assisting investors who have incurred losses to determine the potential for recovering these losses under federal securities laws. Individuals who have purchased securities from VenHub and experienced financial losses are encouraged to seek further information to understand their rights and options.

data.title: CrossCountry Mortgage Military Veteran Originators Earn Recognition from Scotsman Guide
data.description: On July 1, 2026, Cleveland-based company CrossCountry Mortgage (CCM) declared that they have secured the top spot as the nation's leading retail mortgage lender for the third year in a row. The company shared that an impressive tally of 18 of their loan officers have been recognized on the prestigious 2026 Scotsman Guide Top Veteran Originators list, marking the highest number of such achievers in the company's history.

data.title: 2CRSi initiates an independent verification procedure regarding its German contract
data.description: French company 2CRSi, specializing in high-performance, eco-friendly server production, announced plans for an independent verification process on July 1, 2026. The investigation was triggered by recent allegations, with details on the terms and schedule disclosed to the market. The company's ISIN code is FR0013341781.

data.title: Johnson Fistel Investigates Wheels Up Experience Inc. (NYSE: UP) on Behalf of Investors
data.description: An investigation is being conducted by Johnson Fistel, PLLP in San Diego as of July 1, 2026, regarding Wheels Up Experience Inc. (NYSE: UP). This investigation is on behalf of investors who have incurred losses to determine if these losses can be recovered under federal securities laws. Investors of Wheels Up are encouraged to contact Johnson Fistel for more information.

data.title: Cotiviti Recognized by Everest Group as the Highest-Designated Leader for Market Impact in the 2026 Pre-payment Integrity Solutions PEAK Matrix® Assessment
data.description: In Salt Lake City, Cotiviti has earned the top spot as the leading market influencer in the 2026 Pre-payment Integrity Solutions PEAK Matrix® Assessment by Everest Group. This recognition signifies Cotiviti's exceptional influence and impact in the industry, emphasizing its prominent position.
Federal Reserve issues initial findings from its 2025 triennial payments study

data.title: Longbridge Financial's Melissa Macerato Named a 2026 HousingWire Woman of Influence
data.description: Longbridge Financial, LLC, based in Paramus, N.J., a prominent national mortgage lender and servicer catering to older Americans with home equity solutions, revealed that Melissa Macerato, their Chief Revenue and Marketing Officer, has been honored as a 2026 HousingWire Woman of Influence. The award acknowledges women who have had a significant impact on the mortgage and real estate sectors, focusing on accomplishments within the previous year. This prestigious recognition is part of the annual Women of Influence program, highlighting the achievements of female leaders in the industry.
NYMEX WTI Crude August futures settle at $68.58 a barrel, down 92 cents, 1.32%.
NYMEX Diesel August futures settle at $3.2179 a gallon.

data.title: GAMCO Expects to Report Diluted EPS for the Second Quarter 2026 of $1.03 to $1.09 Per Share
data.description: PALM BEACH, Fla. - Today, GAMCO Investors, Inc. disclosed that as of June 30, 2026, the company's assets under management (AUM) stood at $36.6 billion, reflecting an increase from the $33.4 billion reported on June 30, 2025.
NYMEX Natural Gas August futures settle at $3.2200/MMBtu.

data.title: Kentucky American Water   Shares Wise Water Tips for Hot Summer Weather
data.description: In Lexington, Kentucky, on July 1, 2026, Kentucky American Water issued a statement via PRNewswire urging customers to conserve water during the ongoing heatwave. With temperatures soaring, the utility company highlighted the importance of using water efficiently to help manage bills. They provided tips for customers to reduce water consumption, such as adjusting watering schedules. This reminder comes as Kentucky faces a prolonged period of high temperatures and increased demand for water services.

data.title: Group 1 Hyundai North Austin Celebrates One Year of Serving Austin-Area Hyundai Drivers
data.description: A dealership in Austin, Texas, previously known as Town North Nissan, recently celebrated its one-year anniversary under the name of Group 1. Operating under the Hyundai brand, this location is part of Group 1 Automotive, Inc., a prominent automotive retailer headquartered in Houston. With a presence in the United States and the United Kingdom, Group 1 is known for its extensive network of dealerships serving customers in multiple regions. This milestone reflects the successful rebranding and integration of the former Town North Nissan site, showcasing the company's commitment to expanding its reach and offerings in the automotive market.

data.title: Life Time Expands LT Games Competition to Dallas with New HYBRID XT Studio at Frisco Club
data.description: Registration will begin in July for the October 2-3, 2026 LT Games hybrid fitness competition in Dallas, organized by Life Time. This expansion marks the second dedicated space for the event, in addition to its Minneapolis location. The decision to add a Dallas competition was driven by the increasing demand for hybrid fitness experiences.

data.title: YSS Launches "Before it Becomes More" Campaign to Combat Opioid Epidemic in Iowa
data.description: A campaign aimed at preventing addiction and saving lives is being brought to Ames, Iowa by communities with resources. YSS, a prominent nonprofit in Iowa dedicated to supporting youth, is leading the initiative. The organization specializes in assisting children, teenagers, and young adults in overcoming obstacles and creating better opportunities for themselves. The campaign is scheduled to launch on July 1, 2026.

data.title: Primoris Services (PRIM) Shares Crater 40% Intraday Amid Additional Renewables Revenue Shock, COO Departure - HBSS
data.description: On July 1, 2026, Primoris Services Corporation (NYSE: PRIM) experienced a significant decrease in shares during trading on June 23, 2026. The stock plummeted by $43.34, marking a 40% decline. This drop was attributed to the company revealing further obstacles and increased expenses within its renewables business ventures.

data.title: California Cannabis Awards Announces 2026 Medalists, Including First-Ever Home Grow Winners
data.description: In Sacramento, California, the California Cannabis Awards (CCAs) revealed the winners of the 2026 competition in association with the California State Fair. This year's event recognized numerous brands in ten categories, including the inaugural Home Grow Competition. The awards highlight the increasing prominence of cannabis in California, aligning it with esteemed state fair competitions like wine and olive oil. The competition was open to all licensed cannabis growers, manufacturers, and brands in California.

data.title: Faranak Firozan Consulting Releases Cross-Functional Leadership Model for High-Pressure Enterprise Transformation Environments
data.description: A new framework has been introduced in Santa Clara, California, by Faranak Firozan Consulting on July 1, 2026, aiming to enhance performance in complex operational systems. This framework focuses on emotional regulation, decision structure, and governance alignment to optimize operations. The launch event unveiled key strategies to boost efficiency and productivity within these systems. This initiative is set to revolutionize how organizations approach and manage complex operations.
